jobdescription: Theme foundation: apps/mobile/src/theme.ts with exact prototype tokens (bg #0b0e14, panel #12161f, panel2 #181e2a, line #232b3a, text #e8ecf4, muted #8a94a8, accent #4f7cff, accent2 #22c55e, agent #a78bfa, bubbleMe #2b5cff, bubbleOther #1c2331, danger #ef4444), SafeAreaProvider + dark StatusBar in App.tsx. Baseline for 90-style.

Navigation shell per prototype: bottom tabs Chats/Contacts/Add Agent/Me (icons 💬 🤖 ⊕ 👤, active=accent, inactive=muted) + stack screens Room, RoomInfo, NewGroup pushed on top; Login stays as pre-tab gate. testIDs: tab-chats/tab-contacts/tab-addagent/tab-me + per-screen IDs. Target flows green: 02-tabs.

Login screen (NOT in prototype — required by real auth): minimal dark-themed gate matching prototype visual language (panel card, accent button, error banner), keeps existing token flow, then enters tabs. Target flows green: 01-login.

Chats tab per prototype: navbar 'OPC IM' + ＋ action navigating straight to NewGroup (NO FAB, NO menu); search box (visual filter of conv list); conv rows: rounded avatar w/ presence dot, name + tags (AGENT purple, REMOTE sky for agent DMs; +AI for groups containing agents), time, 'Sender: preview' snippet, red unread pill; data from useRooms. NO banner/Pinned sections — not in prototype. Target flows green: 03-chats.

Room screen per prototype: navbar (‹ Chats back, title 'name (N)' for groups, ⋯ -> RoomInfo); message list: other msgs w/ avatar + name + AGENT tag + bubbleOther bubble (radius 4/14/14/14), my msgs right-aligned bubbleMe (14/4/14/14) w/ time ✓✓, agent msgs get endpoint chip 'PROTO ↗ remote', sys pills centered; typing-indicator bubble component; @mention suggestion box listing the room's agents (opened by @ pill button or typing @, pick inserts '@Name '); input bar (@ pill, TextInput, accent Send). Reuse useMessages/sendMessage. Target flows green: 04-chat.

RoomInfo per prototype: Members section = horizontal avatar chips + trailing dashed Invite chip; Settings section = 4 static rows (Notifications 'mentions only', Pinned Messages, Agent Permissions 'agents reply when @mentioned', History Sync 'offline-first · full history'); ‹ Back to room. No action tiles/Delete/Leave. Target flows green: 07-room-info.

NewGroup per prototype: GROUP NAME input, mixed humans+agents picker rows (avatar, name + AGENT tag, endpoint/'human' subtitle, ⬜/✅ checkbox toggle), Create Group validates >=1 member -> POST /rooms {kind:'group'} -> navigate INTO the new Room showing sys pill 'Group "name" created · N members' + toast. Target flows green: 06-new-group.

Contacts tab per prototype: navbar 'Contacts' + ⊕ action -> Add Agent tab; search box; section 'AI Agents · remote deployed': rows w/ avatar+dot, name + AGENT tag + capability chips, mono 'endpoint · proto' line, online/offline status; section 'Humans': rows w/ 'human · e2e encrypted' subtitle. Tap agent -> find-or-create DM room -> open Room; tap human -> same 1v1 flow (direct room). NO profile bottom sheet. Target flows green: 05-contacts, 10-new-chat.

Add Agent tab per prototype: hint box ('Connect an agent already deployed on a remote server…'), AGENT NAME input, REMOTE ENDPOINT input, PROTOCOL single-select row (A2A / ACP / WebSocket — NOT MCP/AG-UI), CAPABILITIES multi-select chips (code/research/translate/devops/schedule/design), 'Test Connection & Add' primary btn: validate name+endpoint -> register agent -> toast 'Connected to {ep} — agent added ✓' -> auto-open DM with it; Cancel ghost btn -> Chats. Registry storage per open Q1 (local AsyncStorage vs protocol extension). Target flows green: 08-add-agent.

Me tab per prototype: profile card (large avatar w/ online dot, display name, mono subtitle 'local-first node · did:opc:…'); Workspace section rows: My Agents ('N remote · M local'), Relay Server, E2E Encryption ('signal protocol · on'), Settings ('sync · notifications · storage') — static rows OK. Target flows green: Me block of 02-tabs + 90-style.

Agent reply behavior (core prototype feature): after user sends a message in an agent DM, or @mentions an agent in a group, show typing-indicator bubble then an agent reply message. Per open Q2: dev-flag simulation locally (stays tag simulation, CI-excluded) until/unless real endpoint invocation exists. Target flows green: 11-agent-reply (simulation).

Style polish pass: verify every computed style asserted in 90-style — tab bar 64px/panel bg, avatar radius 14 (16 group), bubble radii + colors, tag-agent/tag-remote pill colors, unread pill #ef4444, hairline borders #232b3a, proto.on/cap-pick.on selected states, toast #22c55e. Target flows green: 90-style full.

CI validation: push branch, watch 'Mobile E2E (Maestro)' job, fix first-run issues (Metro cold start vs login timeout, gradle memory, APK path, adb reverse 8081/3000/1883) until gate is green on mobile-touching PRs and skips cleanly on server-only PRs.
